## Checklist

- [ ] CI is green (`cargo fmt`, `cargo clippy`, `cargo test`, `pnpm fmt:check`, build).
- [ ] Spec / docs updated if user-facing behavior changed.
- [ ] No new `unwrap()` outside tests; no `any` in TS without justification.
- [ ] Keyboard reachable (for UI changes).
